meanwhile: Researchers reported that a new AI model predicted novel antibiotic structures that proved effective against drug-resistant bacteria in animal trials, published April 2026.
A large clinical study published April 2026 found continuous glucose monitoring in non-diabetic adults reduced cardiovascular risk markers significantly over 12 months.
A new cross-country survey published April 2026 found majority support for authoritarian governance among adults under 35 in four Southeast Asian nations.
